unitName: 狗狗拯救危機 | Dog saves the day!

article.title: Dog saves the day! 狗狗拯救危機

paragraphs.english: Are dogs loving friends or amazing security guards? The answer is both!
sentences: Are dogs loving friends or amazing security guards?
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 狗狗是充滿愛心的朋友，還是出色的保安？答案是兩者都是！
translation_sentences: 🌐 狗狗是充滿愛心的朋友，還是出色的保安？

implication.english: 💡 The opening question introduces the dual role of dogs: as companions and protectors.
implication.chinese: 💡 開場問題介紹了狗的雙重角色：伴侶和保護者。[換句話說]：狗不只是我們的朋友，還能保護我們的安全。

paragraphs.english: Last weekend, a German shepherd dog stopped a robbery at a house in Hong Kong.
sentences: Last weekend, a German shepherd dog stopped a robbery at a house in Hong Kong.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 上週末，在香港，一隻德國牧羊犬阻止了一起入屋搶劫案。
translation_sentences: 🌐 上週末，在香港，一隻德國牧羊犬阻止了一起入屋搶劫案。

implication.english: 💡 This sentence gives the main news event: a dog stopped a robbery.
implication.chinese: 💡 這句話給出了主要新聞事件：一隻狗阻止了一場搶劫。[換句話說]：上週末香港有隻德國牧羊犬立了大功，阻止了小偷。

paragraphs.english: On Saturday night, a robber broke into a house and wanted to steal expensive artwork and money, but he never got the chance. Max, the dog that lived in the house, heard the robber and started to bark.
sentences: On Saturday night, a robber broke into a house and wanted to steal expensive artwork and money, but he never got the chance.
Max, the dog that lived in the house, heard the robber and started to bark.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 星期六晚上，一名竊賊闖入一棟房子，想要偷昂貴的藝術品和錢，但他根本沒有機會。住在房子裡的狗馬克斯聽到了竊賊的聲音，開始吠叫。
translation_sentences: 🌐 星期六晚上，一名竊賊闖入一棟房子，想要偷昂貴的藝術品和錢，但他根本沒有機會。
住在房子裡的狗馬克斯聽到了竊賊的聲音，開始吠叫。

implication.english: 💡 Describes the attempted robbery and how Max's barking foiled it.
implication.chinese: 💡 描述企圖搶劫以及馬克斯的吠叫如何阻止了它。[換句話說]：小偷想偷東西，但馬克斯一聽到聲音就開始叫，讓他沒辦法得手。

paragraphs.english: The loud barking woke up the owner of the house. 'I knew something was wrong, but I didn't know what,' the owner said. 'Was it a robber or just someone taking out the rubbish?'
sentences: The loud barking woke up the owner of the house.
'I knew something was wrong, but I didn't know what,' the owner said.
'Was it a robber or just someone taking out the rubbish?'
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 大聲的狗叫聲吵醒了屋主。「我知道出事了，但我不知道是什麼事，」屋主說。「是竊賊，還是只是有人在倒垃圾？」
translation_sentences: 🌐 大聲的狗叫聲吵醒了屋主。
「我知道出事了，但我不知道是什麼事，」屋主說。
「是竊賊，還是只是有人在倒垃圾？」

implication.english: 💡 Shows the owner's confusion upon waking, highlighting the effectiveness of Max's bark.
implication.chinese: 💡 顯示屋主醒來時的困惑，凸顯馬克斯吠叫的效果。[換句話說]：屋主被吵醒，一開始還搞不清楚發生什麼事，以為是有人在外面倒垃圾。

paragraphs.english: The owner got out of bed and went to his living room. He shouted at the robber and the dog growled and barked at the man. 'I was quite scared, but my dog was not afraid at all,' the owner said.
sentences: The owner got out of bed and went to his living room.
He shouted at the robber and the dog growled and barked at the man.
'I was quite scared, but my dog was not afraid at all,' the owner said.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 屋主下床走到客廳。他對竊賊大喊，而狗也對那人低吼吠叫。「我當時很害怕，但我的狗一點都不怕，」屋主說。
translation_sentences: 他對竊賊大喊，而狗也對那人低吼吠叫。
「我當時很害怕，但我的狗一點都不怕，」屋主說。

implication.english: 💡 The owner and dog confront the robber together, showing the dog's bravery.
implication.chinese: 💡 屋主和狗一起對抗竊賊，顯示狗的勇敢。[換句話說]：屋主下樓查看，和狗一起對小偷大吼，雖然屋主很害怕，但狗一點也不怕。

paragraphs.english: The robber ran away, and the police found him an hour later.
sentences: The robber ran away, and the police found him an hour later.
paragraphs.translation: 🌐 竊賊逃跑了，警察一小時後找到了他。
translation_sentences: 🌐 竊賊逃跑了，警察一小時後找到了他。

implication.english: 💡 The happy ending: the robber is caught thanks to Max.
implication.chinese: 💡 快樂結局：多虧馬克斯，小偷被抓住了。[換句話說]：小偷被嚇跑，最後還是被警察抓到了。
